name: embedded-design-docs
description: Write HLD, LLD, and unified design documents for embedded software.

interface.shortDescription: Draft embedded HLD, LLD, and unified docs
interface.longDescription: Use Embedded Design Docs to create review-ready embedded software design documents with templates, interface checks, error handling flows, compatibility guidance, and domain prompts.
defaultPrompt: Draft an embedded software design doc.
Write an HLD for this embedded system.
Review this embedded LLD for missing interfaces.
